default.title: SEMA Approved
default.desc: Our repair system is approved by the Storage Equipment Manufacturers’ Association, the UK’s leading authority on storage systems.

default.title: BS EN 15512
default.desc: Goliath™ meets the structural design requirements for adjustable pallet racking systems as defined by this European standard.

default.title: BS EN 15635
default.desc: Our solution aligns with the application and maintenance requirements for steel static storage systems.

default.title: Registered Design
default.desc: Goliath™ is a registered design, protected intellectual property available exclusively through our network.
